vectors.comment: supplementary vector (not from RFC 8439): same key as tcId 1, message re-chunked to exactly two 16-byte blocks so the accumulated length is a multiple of 16 and the implementation's partial-final-block path is skipped. Tag computed independently with a straightforward mod-(2^130-5) bignum reference implementation of the RFC 8439 sec 2.5 algorithm (clamp r, accumulate blocks, add s mod 2^128), cross-checked against tcId 1 to confirm the reference reproduces the published tag before use here.
